revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} ==Purposes== Similar to the [[Template:Wikipedia help pages]], but simplified. But all the links of that template should be able to be accessed if the links at the top of the navbox are accessed (i.e. Help Menu; Tutorials and introductions; The Missing Manual; Noticeboards; FAQs; Reference desk). In addition, some extra links from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]] are included, as well as some other links. Also, the links are rearranged into different groups, which should be self-explanatory. * [[Help:Menu|Help menu]]: the 13 links are not included, but the Help menu link is at the top of the navbox. * [[Help:Getting started|Tutorials and introductions]]: this is included at the top of the navbox. Most tutorials and introductions are included in the navbox, but they are included within the other groups, e.g. [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]), producing [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]). * [[Help: Wikipedia: The Missing Manual|''The Missing Manual'']]: the 25 links from the book are not included, but there is a link for the book contents at the top of the screen. * [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Index|FAQs]]: the numerous FAQs (apart from the readers' one) are not included, but there is a link to the FAQ index at the top. * [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards|Noticeboards]]: most of the noticeboards are not listed, but there is a link at the top to a page, to a page with a navbox listing them all. * [[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]]: the reference desk subjects are not listed, but there is a link at the top of the navbox, to a page listing them all. In addition: * Additional links are included, including some from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]. * Links are rearranged into different groups. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia basic information]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} ==Purposes== Similar to the [[Template:Wikipedia help pages]], but simplified. But all the links of that template should be able to be accessed if the links at the top of the navbox are accessed (i.e. Help Menu; Tutorials and introductions; The Missing Manual; Noticeboards; FAQs; Reference desk). In addition, some extra links from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]] are included, as well as some other links. Also, the links are rearranged into different groups, which should be self-explanatory. * [[Help:Menu|Help menu]]: the 13 links are not included, but the Help menu link is at the top of the navbox. * [[Help:Getting started|Tutorials and introductions]]: this is included at the top of the navbox. Most tutorials and introductions are included in the navbox, but they are included within the other groups, e.g. [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]), producing [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]). * [[Help: Wikipedia: The Missing Manual|''The Missing Manual'']]: the 25 links from the book are not included, but there is a link for the book contents at the top of the screen. * [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Index|FAQs]]: the numerous FAQs (apart from the readers' one) are not included, but there is a link to the FAQ index at the top. * [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards|Noticeboards]]: most of the noticeboards are not listed, but there is a link at the top to a page, to a page with a navbox listing them all. * [[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]]: the reference desk subjects are not listed, but there is a link at the top of the navbox, to a page listing them all. In addition: * Additional links are included, including some from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]. * Links are rearranged into different groups. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia basic information]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} ==Purposes== Similar to the [[Template:Wikipedia help pages]], but simplified. But all the links of that template should be able to be accessed if the links at the top of the navbox are accessed (i.e. Help Menu; Tutorials and introductions; The Missing Manual; Noticeboards; FAQs; Reference desk). In addition, some extra links from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]] are included, as well as some other links. Also, the links are rearranged into different groups, which should be self-explanatory. * [[Help:Menu|Help menu]]: the 13 links are not included, but the Help menu link is at the top of the navbox. * [[Help:Getting started|Tutorials and introductions]]: this is included at the top of the navbox. Most tutorials and introductions are included in the navbox, but they are included within the other groups, e.g. [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]), producing [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]). * [[Help: Wikipedia: The Missing Manual|''The Missing Manual'']]: the 25 links from the book are not included, but there is a link for the book contents at the top of the screen. * [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Index|FAQs]]: the numerous FAQs (apart from the readers' one) are not included, but there is a link to the FAQ index at the top. * [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards|Noticeboards]]: most of the noticeboards are not listed, but there is a link at the top to a page, to a page with a navbox listing them all. * [[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]]: the reference desk subjects are not listed, but there is a link at the top of the navbox, to a page listing them all. In addition: * Additional links are included, including some from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]. * Links are rearranged into different groups. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia basic information]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} ==Purposes== Similar to the [[Template:Wikipedia help pages]], but simplified. But all the links of that template should be able to be accessed if the links at the top of the navbox are accessed (i.e. Help Menu; Tutorials and introductions; The Missing Manual; Noticeboards; FAQs; Reference desk). In addition, some extra links from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]] are included, as well as some other links. Also, the links are rearranged into different groups, which should be self-explanatory. * [[Help:Menu|Help menu]]: the 13 links are not included, but the Help menu link is at the top of the navbox. * [[Help:Getting started|Tutorials and introductions]]: this is included at the top of the navbox. Most tutorials and introductions are included in the navbox, but they are included within the other groups, e.g. [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]), producing [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]). * [[Help: Wikipedia: The Missing Manual|''The Missing Manual'']]: the 25 links from the book are not included, but there is a link for the book contents at the top of the screen. * [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Index|FAQs]]: the numerous FAQs (apart from the readers' one) are not included, but there is a link to the FAQ index at the top. * [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards|Noticeboards]]: most of the noticeboards are not listed, but there is a link at the top to a page, to a page with a navbox listing them all. * [[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]]: the reference desk subjects are not listed, but there is a link at the top of the navbox, to a page listing them all. In addition: * Additional links are included, including some from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]. * Links are rearranged into different groups. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia basic information]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} ==Purposes== Similar to the [[Template:Wikipedia help pages]], but simplified. But all the links of that template should be able to be accessed if the links at the top of the navbox are accessed (i.e. Help Menu; Tutorials and introductions; The Missing Manual; Noticeboards; FAQs; Reference desk). In addition, some extra links from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]] are included, as well as some other links. Also, the links are rearranged into different groups, which should be self-explanatory. * [[Help:Menu|Help menu]]: the 13 links are not included, but the Help menu link is at the top of the navbox. * [[Help:Getting started|Tutorials and introductions]]: this is included at the top of the navbox. Most tutorials and introductions are included in the navbox, but they are included within the other groups, e.g. [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]), producing [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]). * [[Help: Wikipedia: The Missing Manual|''The Missing Manual'']]: the 25 links from the book are not included, but there is a link for the book contents at the top of the screen. * [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Index|FAQs]]: the numerous FAQs (apart from the readers' one) are not included, but there is a link to the FAQ index at the top. * [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards|Noticeboards]]: most of the noticeboards are not listed, but there is a link at the top to a page, to a page with a navbox listing them all. * [[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]]: the reference desk subjects are not listed, but there is a link at the top of the navbox, to a page listing them all. In addition: * Additional links are included, including some from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]. * Links are rearranged into different groups. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia basic information]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} ==Purposes== Similar to the [[Template:Wikipedia help pages]], but simplified. But all the links of that template should be able to be accessed if the links at the top of the navbox are accessed (i.e. Help Menu; Tutorials and introductions; The Missing Manual; Noticeboards; FAQs; Reference desk). In addition, some extra links from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]] are included, as well as some other links. Also, the links are rearranged into different groups, which should be self-explanatory. * [[Help:Menu|Help menu]]: the 13 links are not included, but the Help menu link is at the top of the navbox. * [[Help:Getting started|Tutorials and introductions]]: this is included at the top of the navbox. Most tutorials and introductions are included in the navbox, but they are included within the other groups, e.g. [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]), producing [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]). * [[Help: Wikipedia: The Missing Manual|''The Missing Manual'']]: the 25 links from the book are not included, but there is a link for the book contents at the top of the screen. * [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Index|FAQs]]: the numerous FAQs (apart from the readers' one) are not included, but there is a link to the FAQ index at the top. * [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards|Noticeboards]]: most of the noticeboards are not listed, but there is a link at the top to a page, to a page with a navbox listing them all. * [[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]]: the reference desk subjects are not listed, but there is a link at the top of the navbox, to a page listing them all. In addition: * Additional links are included, including some from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]. * Links are rearranged into different groups. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia basic information]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} ==Purposes== Similar to the [[Template:Wikipedia help pages]], but simplified. But all the links of that template should be able to be accessed if the links at the top of the navbox are accessed (i.e. Help Menu; Tutorials and introductions; The Missing Manual; Noticeboards; FAQs; Reference desk). In addition, some extra links from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]] are included, as well as some other links. Also, the links are rearranged into different groups, which should be self-explanatory. * [[Help:Menu|Help menu]]: the 13 links are not included, but the Help menu link is at the top of the navbox. * [[Help:Getting started|Tutorials and introductions]]: this is included at the top of the navbox. Most tutorials and introductions are included in the navbox, but they are included within the other groups, e.g. [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]), producing [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]). * [[Help: Wikipedia: The Missing Manual|''The Missing Manual'']]: the 25 links from the book are not included, but there is a link for the book contents at the top of the screen. * [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Index|FAQs]]: the numerous FAQs (apart from the readers' one) are not included, but there is a link to the FAQ index at the top. * [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards|Noticeboards]]: most of the noticeboards are not listed, but there is a link at the top to a page, to a page with a navbox listing them all. * [[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]]: the reference desk subjects are not listed, but there is a link at the top of the navbox, to a page listing them all. In addition: * Additional links are included, including some from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]. * Links are rearranged into different groups. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia basic information]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} ==Purposes== Similar to the [[Template:Wikipedia help pages]], but simplified. But all the links of that template should be able to be accessed if the links at the top of the navbox are accessed (i.e. Help Menu; Tutorials and introductions; The Missing Manual; Noticeboards; FAQs; Reference desk). In addition, some extra links from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]] are included, as well as some other links. Also, the links are rearranged into different groups, which should be self-explanatory. * [[Help:Menu|Help menu]]: the 13 links are not included, but the Help menu link is at the top of the navbox. * [[Help:Getting started|Tutorials and introductions]]: this is included at the top of the navbox. Most tutorials and introductions are included in the navbox, but they are included within the other groups, e.g. [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]), producing [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]). * [[Help: Wikipedia: The Missing Manual|''The Missing Manual'']]: the 25 links from the book are not included, but there is a link for the book contents at the top of the screen. * [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Index|FAQs]]: the numerous FAQs (apart from the readers' one) are not included, but there is a link to the FAQ index at the top. * [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards|Noticeboards]]: most of the noticeboards are not listed, but there is a link at the top to a page, to a page with a navbox listing them all. * [[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]]: the reference desk subjects are not listed, but there is a link at the top of the navbox, to a page listing them all. In addition: * Additional links are included, including some from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]. * Links are rearranged into different groups. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia basic information]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} ==Purposes== Similar to the [[Template:Wikipedia help pages]], but simplified. But all the links of that template should be able to be accessed if the links at the top of the navbox are accessed (i.e. Help Menu; Tutorials and introductions; The Missing Manual; Noticeboards; FAQs; Reference desk). In addition, some extra links from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]] are included, as well as some other links. Also, the links are rearranged into different groups, which should be self-explanatory. * [[Help:Menu|Help menu]]: the 13 links are not included, but the Help menu link is at the top of the navbox. * [[Help:Getting started|Tutorials and introductions]]: this is included at the top of the navbox. Most tutorials and introductions are included in the navbox, but they are included within the other groups, e.g. [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]), producing [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]). * [[Help: Wikipedia: The Missing Manual|''The Missing Manual'']]: the 25 links from the book are not included, but there is a link for the book contents at the top of the screen. * [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Index|FAQs]]: the numerous FAQs (apart from the readers' one) are not included, but there is a link to the FAQ index at the top. * [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards|Noticeboards]]: most of the noticeboards are not listed, but there is a link at the top to a page, to a page with a navbox listing them all. * [[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]]: the reference desk subjects are not listed, but there is a link at the top of the navbox, to a page listing them all. In addition: * Additional links are included, including some from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]. * Links are rearranged into different groups. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia basic information]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Basic_information%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Collapsible option |statename=optional}} ==Purposes== Similar to the [[Template:Wikipedia help pages]], but simplified. But all the links of that template should be able to be accessed if the links at the top of the navbox are accessed (i.e. Help Menu; Tutorials and introductions; The Missing Manual; Noticeboards; FAQs; Reference desk). In addition, some extra links from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]] are included, as well as some other links. Also, the links are rearranged into different groups, which should be self-explanatory. * [[Help:Menu|Help menu]]: the 13 links are not included, but the Help menu link is at the top of the navbox. * [[Help:Getting started|Tutorials and introductions]]: this is included at the top of the navbox. Most tutorials and introductions are included in the navbox, but they are included within the other groups, e.g. [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]), producing [[Help:Navigation|Navigation]] ([[Help:Introduction to navigating Wikipedia/1|Introduction]]). * [[Help: Wikipedia: The Missing Manual|''The Missing Manual'']]: the 25 links from the book are not included, but there is a link for the book contents at the top of the screen. * [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Index|FAQs]]: the numerous FAQs (apart from the readers' one) are not included, but there is a link to the FAQ index at the top. * [[Wikipedia:Noticeboards|Noticeboards]]: most of the noticeboards are not listed, but there is a link at the top to a page, to a page with a navbox listing them all. * [[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]]: the reference desk subjects are not listed, but there is a link at the top of the navbox, to a page listing them all. In addition: * Additional links are included, including some from [[:Category:Wikipedia basic information]]. * Links are rearranged into different groups. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia basic information]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
